description: Ecommerce orders, products, customers, inventory, fulfillment orders, and bulk operations via the Shopify Admin GraphQL API.

tools.name: customers_get
tools.description: Get one Shopify customer by GraphQL ID. Required: id. Returns the ShopifyCustomer.

tools.name: customers_list
tools.description: List customers from the Shopify Admin GraphQL API. Optional: first (default: 100), after. Returns array of ShopifyCustomer.

params.name: first
params.description: Page size for Shopify cursor pagination.

tools.name: fulfillment-orders_get
tools.description: Get one Shopify fulfillment order by GraphQL ID. Required: id. Returns the ShopifyFulfillmentOrder.

tools.name: fulfillment-orders_list
tools.description: List fulfillment orders from the Shopify Admin GraphQL API. Optional: first (default: 100), after. Returns array of ShopifyFulfillmentOrder.

params.name: first
params.description: Page size for Shopify cursor pagination.

tools.name: inventory-items_get
tools.description: Get one Shopify inventory item by GraphQL ID. Required: id. Returns the ShopifyInventoryItem.

tools.name: inventory-items_list
tools.description: List inventory items from the Shopify Admin GraphQL API. Optional: first (default: 100), after. Returns array of ShopifyInventoryItem.

params.name: first
params.description: Page size for Shopify cursor pagination.

tools.name: orders_get
tools.description: Get one Shopify order by GraphQL ID. Required: id. Returns the ShopifyOrder.

tools.name: orders_list
tools.description: List orders from the Shopify Admin GraphQL API. Optional: first (default: 100), after. Returns array of ShopifyOrder.

params.name: first
params.description: Page size for Shopify cursor pagination.

tools.name: products_get
tools.description: Get one Shopify product by GraphQL ID. Required: id. Returns the ShopifyProduct.

tools.name: products_list
tools.description: List products from the Shopify Admin GraphQL API. Optional: first (default: 100), after. Returns array of ShopifyProduct.

params.name: first
params.description: Page size for Shopify cursor pagination.
